blocks.body: Had better daje mocną radę albo ostrzeżenie: coś warto zrobić, bo inaczej może pojawić się problem.

{"level":"A2-B1","intro":"Had better używamy do mocnej rady albo ostrzeżenia. Często czuć, że istnieje ryzyko lub nieprzyjemny skutek, jeśli ktoś tego nie zrobi.","rules":[{"label":"MOCNA RADA","color":"emerald","text":"Po had better użyj base verb bez to.","example":"You had better leave now."},{"label":"OSTRZEŻENIE","color":"blue","text":"Ta konstrukcja często niesie ukryty skutek: inaczej będzie problem.","example":"We'd better hurry, or we'll miss the train."},{"label":"FORMA PRZECZĄCA","color":"amber","text":"Forma przecząca to had better not + base verb.","example":"You'd better not touch that wire."}]}

{"title":"1. Forma","intro":"Ta konstrukcja jest krótka, ale ma stały wzór:","items":[{"label":"Twierdzenie","title":"had better + base verb","subtitle":"You had better call him now."},{"label":"Przeczenie","title":"had better not + base verb","subtitle":"You had better not be late."},{"label":"Skrócenie","title":"'d better","subtitle":"We'd better go."},{"label":"Pytanie","title":"Hadn't we better ...?","subtitle":"Hadn't we better check first?"}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy używamy","sections":[{"label":"Mocna rada","color":"emerald","description":"Mówiący uważa daną czynność za najlepsze rozwiązanie w konkretnej sytuacji.","examples":[{"en":"You'd better see a doctor about that cough.","ua":"Lepiej, żebyś poszedł do lekarza z tym kaszlem."},{"en":"I'd better finish this report tonight.","ua":"Lepiej, żebym skończył ten raport dziś wieczorem."}]},{"label":"Ostrzeżenie przed skutkiem","color":"blue","description":"Często czujemy, że w przeciwnym razie wydarzy się coś nieprzyjemnego.","examples":[{"en":"You'd better back up your files.","ua":"Lepiej zrób kopię zapasową plików."},{"en":"We'd better leave now, or the roads will be blocked.","ua":"Lepiej wyjedźmy teraz, bo inaczej drogi będą zablokowane."}]},{"label":"Nie dla neutralnej preferencji","color":"amber","description":"Had better nie oznacza po prostu gustu albo preferencji. Do tego częściej potrzebne jest would rather albo czasem should.","examples":[{"en":"I'd rather stay home tonight.","ua":"Wolałbym dziś zostać w domu."},{"en":"You should try the new restaurant.","ua":"Powinieneś spróbować nowej restauracji."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie to po had better.","wrong":"You had better to go now.","right":"You had better go now.","hint":"Po had better używamy formy podstawowej bez to."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Budowanie przeczenia przez do.","wrong":"You don't had better wait.","right":"You had better not wait.","hint":"Forma przecząca to had better not."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Mylenie mocnej rady z prostą preferencją.","wrong":"I'd better have tea than coffee.","right":"I'd rather have tea than coffee.","hint":"Przy wyborze między opcjami zwykle potrzebujesz would rather, a nie had better."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótka reguła","items":["Had better + base verb = mocna rada albo ostrzeżenie.","Forma przecząca: had better not + base verb.","Po had better nie używamy to.","Dla zwykłej preferencji zwykle potrzebujesz would rather, a nie had better."]}

{"title":"Strony w tym dziale","items":[{"label":"Zero Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/zero-conditional","current":false},{"label":"First Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/first-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Second Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/second-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Third Conditional","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/third-conditional","current":false},{"label":"Mixed Conditionals","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/mixed-conditionals","current":false},{"label":"Unless / Provided / As long as","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/unless-provided-as-long-as","current":false},{"label":"In case","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/in-case","current":false},{"label":"Wish / If only","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/wish-if-only","current":false},{"label":"Would rather","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/would-rather","current":false},{"label":"Had better","url":"/pl/theory/conditionals/had-better","current":true}]}
